Frequently Asked Questions

Yes, 100% free. No hidden fees, no catch. We host this seminar to educate Oklahoma City families about alternative paths to homeownership. You won't be asked to pay anything.

No! That's exactly what this seminar is about. We'll teach you alternative financing options — Rent-to-Own, Lease Options, and Contract for Deed — that don't require traditional bank approval or a perfect credit score.

Just yourself and an open mind! We'll provide everything you need. Bring a notebook if you'd like to take notes. Light refreshments will be provided.

No. This is a genuine educational event. You'll leave with real, actionable knowledge about how to buy a home without a bank. No pressure, no hard sells — just information you can use.

The event is in Oklahoma City. The exact address and directions will be sent to you via email and text after you register below. This ensures we can manage capacity and provide you with parking details.

Absolutely! We encourage it. Buying a home is a family decision, and we want everyone involved to hear the information firsthand. Just make sure they register too so we can save their seat.

Still Have Questions?

Your seat is free — and we answer everything at the event. Don't miss it.

This is not legal or financial advice. Tez is a licensed real estate agent in Oklahoma, not an attorney or financial advisor. Home Run Homes is a matchmaking service connecting buyers with owner-financed properties. Always read agreements before signing and consult with appropriate professionals.
